description: Reusable frontend/backend blocks for rapid app scaffolding

blocks.name: Next.js App Shell
blocks.description: package.json, next.config.js, Tailwind CSS, app/layout.js, globals.css

blocks.name: Supabase Client Setup
blocks.description: Browser + server Supabase clients, middleware for session refresh

blocks.name: Email + Password Auth
blocks.description: Login page, signup page, forgot/reset password, logout API route

blocks.name: Dashboard Layout
blocks.description: Sidebar nav + header shell, mobile-responsive, slot for page content

blocks.name: CRUD Data Table
blocks.description: DataTable component with sort, filter, pagination + add/edit/delete modals

blocks.name: CRUD API Route
blocks.description: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE API route template wired to Supabase

blocks.name: AI Chat Component
blocks.description: Streaming AI chat UI + API route using Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6)

blocks.name: Landing Page
blocks.description: Hero section + features grid + CTA + footer — dark modern design

blocks.name: Stripe Payments
blocks.description: Create payment intent, confirm, webhook handler, lib/stripe.js wrapper

blocks.name: File Upload (Supabase Storage)
blocks.description: Multipart upload API → Supabase Storage bucket → returns public URL

blocks.name: Email Sending (Resend)
blocks.description: lib/resend.js wrapper + transactional email API route template

blocks.name: Environment Template
blocks.description: .env.local template with all standard service vars pre-filled
